response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with genuine systems-level experience (low-latency DLang services, async I/O, event-driven architectures), but the role is fundamentally a hands-on C++ position and his professional C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus academic work. There is no evidence of the required industrial-cybersecurity background (IEC 62443, SDL), no MQTT or industrial protocol experience, and his recent decade has centered on TypeScript/Node.js web platforms rather than networked multi-threaded C++ systems.
strengths: Deep systems experience with low-latency, high-throughput services (async I/O, fibers, caching at millions of requests/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship, mentoring and teaching experience
Broad full-stack range with event-driven and distributed-platform work (Kubernetes-deployable geo-data platform)
concerns: Minimal and dated professional C++/STL experience (brief role ending 2015); primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No industrial-cybersecurity exposure: no IEC 62443, SDL, or secure-development-lifecycle credentials mentioned
No MQTT, message-broker, or industrial protocol (Modbus, OPC UA, DNP3) experience listed
